titleStmt.title: SII 16.7: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 7. (A.R. No. 270 of 1905.) TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up to the north of the Chīkaṭimidde of the Tripurāntakēśvara temple.

This is dated Śaka 1307, expressed by the chronogram Śaila-viyad-guṇa-indu, Krōdhana, Kārtika Śu. 1, Śunday. If śu. 1 is a mistake for śu. 11, the details regularly correspond to 1385 A.D., October 14, Sunday, °12.

It records the formation of Dēvarāya-nadi by connecting the streams Gandhavatī and Pullēru alias Vyāghrāpagā by Bhikshāvṛitti Siddayadēvayyaṅgāru for the merit of Vīra Dēvarāya, son of Vīra Harihararāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© krōdhanasaṁvatsara kā
¨rttika śu 1 Ā svastiśrī śrī
pa¨rvvataśirōmaṇi śrī
komāragiri śrītripu
rāṁtaka śrīmanmahā
dēvadivya śrīpādapa
dmārādhakulaina śrīkai
lāsamumīṁdi dēvāpṛ
thvīmahāmahattu mu
khyamaina bhikṣāvrittiśiddhaya
dēvayyaṁgāru svastiśrīma
nmahāmaṁḍḍaḷēśvara rājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīra harihararāyani
ṁgāri kumāruṁḍu śrīvī
radēvarāyaṁgārki buṇya
mugānu gaṁdhāvatīgalaya
nu pulēṭiṁbāḍisa dēvarāyana
di Ācaṁdrā¨rkka[sthāIgānu] cē
yiṁcciri . śākē śailaviya
dguṇēṁdugaṇitē saṁvatsarē
krōdhanē puṇyē kā¨rttika śukla
pakṣatidisē śrīdēvarā
yaprabhōḥ . siṁdhuṁ gaṁdha
vatīṁ samagrasalilāṁ vyāgrā
bhidhāṁ cāpagāṁ bhikṣāvṛ
ttirasāvayōjayadubhē
ssatkī¨rtti puṇyāptayē .
Digital edition of SII 16.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
